name: @cap/sandbox-provider-aio
description: AIO/Docker sandbox provider lifecycle controller for CAP.

scripts.test: pnpm build && node test/aio-local-provider.test.mjs && node test/aio-provider-controller.test.mjs && node test/aio-provider.test.mjs && node test/aio-retention-store.test.mjs && node test/aio-select-launch.test.mjs && node test/aio-terminal-runtime.test.mjs && node test/aio-terminal-transport.test.mjs && node test/aio-pty-client-runtime.test.mjs && node test/aio-codex-launch.test.mjs && node test/aio-terminal-cpr.test.mjs && node test/aio-terminal-autostart.test.mjs && node test/tar-extract.test.mjs
scripts.coverage: pnpm build && c8 --100 --include=dist/**/*.js --reporter=text sh -c "node test/aio-local-provider.test.mjs && node test/aio-provider-controller.test.mjs && node test/aio-provider.test.mjs && node test/aio-retention-store.test.mjs && node test/aio-select-launch.test.mjs && node test/aio-terminal-runtime.test.mjs && node test/aio-terminal-transport.test.mjs && node test/aio-pty-client-runtime.test.mjs && node test/aio-codex-launch.test.mjs && node test/aio-terminal-cpr.test.mjs && node test/aio-terminal-autostart.test.mjs && node test/tar-extract.test.mjs"
